userMessage: Set edge trigger on CH1 rising at 1V normal mode

response.text:
I can’t emit applyable TekAutomate JSON for this turn.

Reason: the needed SCPI headers were verified, but the final concrete commands were not materialized via MCP this turn, and your runtime policy says to fail closed rather than guess.

Verified headers found:
- `TRIGger:A:MODe  {AUTO|NORMal}`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:TYPe  {EDGE|...}`

- `TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SLOpe  {RISe|FALL|EITher}`

If you want, on the next turn I can build the full `steps_json` once those commands are materialized.
